languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, вы... вы пришли!" {n}Одноглазый мужчина мешкает и неловко кланяется.{/n} "У нас просьба! Прошение! Прошение о разрешении на {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментацию{/g} работников ранга ниже младшего офицера в отсеке сектор Бионика в виду необходимости повышения эффективности рабочего персонала". {n}Он выпаливает явно заученные слова скороговоркой, после чего сварливо добавляет.{/n} "Гады не хотят нас к железным рукам и ногам подпускать! А мы ведь только работать хотим, вам да {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богу-Императору{/g} на благо!"

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, вы... вы пришли!" {n}Одноглазый мужчина мешкает и неловко кланяется.{/n} "У нас просьба! Прошение! Прошение о разрешении на {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментацию{/g} работников ранга ниже младшего офицера в отсеке сектор Бионика в виду необходимости повышения эффективности рабочего персонала". {n}Он выпаливает явно заученные слова скороговоркой, после чего сварливо добавляет.{/n} "Гады не хотят нас к железным рукам и ногам подпускать! А мы ведь только работать хотим, вам да {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богу-Императору{/g} на благо!"
traits.speaker: MB_Lowlife

languages.text: "Lord Captain, you... you came!" {n}The one-eyed man hesitates and bows awkwardly.{/n} "We have a request! A petition! To authorise the {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} of workers below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}!"
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, вы... вы пришли!" {n}Одноглазый мужчина мешкает и неловко кланяется.{/n} "У нас просьба! Прошение! А мы ведь только работать хотим, вам да {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Богу-Императору{/g} на благо!"

To authorise the augmentation of works below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the God-Emperor!"

languages.text: 「艦長様、ご... ご来臨！」{n}片目の男は躊躇し、ぎこちなく頭を下げる。{/n}「お願いです！請願です！セクター・ビオニカの准尉以下の職位の人員増強を許可してください。労働者の効率を上げるためです。」{n}彼は明らかに暗記した言葉を早口で吐き出し、さらに不機嫌そうに付け加える。{/n}「害虫たちは鉄の腕や脚を与えようとしない！でも、ただ働きたいだけだ。あなたと神皇帝のために！」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, you... you came!" {n}The one-eyed man hesitates and bows awkwardly.{/n} "We have a request! A petition! To authorise the augmentation of works below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the God-Emperor!"

traits.locale_text: 「艦長様、ご... ご来臨！」{n}片目の男は躊躇し、ぎこちなく頭を下げる。「お願いです！請願です！セクター・ビオニカの准尉以下の職位の人員増強を許可してください。労働者の効率を上げるためです。」{n}彼は明らかに暗記した言葉を早口で吐き出し、さらに不機嫌そうに付け加える。「害虫たちは鉄の腕や脚を与えようとしない！でも、ただ働きたいだけだ。あなたと神皇帝のために！」

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan... Geldiniz!" {n}Tek gözlü adam, tereddüt içinde beceriksizce eğiliyor.{/n} "Bir talebimiz var! İş gücünün verimliliğini artırma ihtiyacı nedeniyle Sektör Biyonika'daki kıdemsiz subay rütbesinin altındaki işçilerin {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmentasyonuna{/g} izin vermenizi rica ediyoruz." {n}Ezberlediği belli olan kelimeleri hızlı bir şekilde söylüyor, sonra hırçın bir şekilde eklemede bulunuyor.{/n} "Haşereler bize demir kollar ve bacaklar vermek istemiyor! Biz sadece sizin ve {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} iyiliği için çalışmak istiyoruz!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, you... you came!" {n}The one-eyed man hesitates and bows awkwardly.{/n} "We have a request! A petition! To authorise the {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} of workers below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan... Geldiniz!" {n}Tek gözlü adam, tereddüt içinde beceriksizce eğiliyor.{/n} "Bir talebimiz var! İş gücünün verimliliğini artırma ihtiyacı nedeniyle Sektör Biyonika'daki kıdemsiz subay rütbesinin altındaki işçilerin {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmentasyonuna{/g} izin vermenizi rica ediyoruz." {n}Ezberlediği belli olan kelimeleri hızlı bir şekilde söylüyor, sonra hırçın bir şekilde eklemede bulunuyor.{/n} "Haşereler bize demir kollar ve bacaklar vermek istemiyor! Biz sadece sizin ve {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator'un{/g} iyiliği için çalışmak istiyoruz!"

languages.text: «¡Lord Capitán! Ha... ¡ha venido!». {n}El hombre tuerto duda y hace una torpe reverencia.{/n} «¡Tenemos una solicitud! ¡Una petición! Por favor, autorice el {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumento{/g} de trabajadores por debajo del rango de oficial novato en el Sector Bionica para responder a la necesidad de mejorar la eficiencia de su mano de obra». {n}Vomita las palabras claramente memorizadas en un veloz aluvión, y después añade de mala manera:{/n} «¡Estas sabandijas no quieren darnos brazos y piernas de hierro, pero nosotros solo queremos trabajar por usted y por el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}!».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, you... you came!" {n}The one-eyed man hesitates and bows awkwardly.{/n} "We have a request! A petition! To authorise the {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} of workers below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Lord Capitán! Ha... ¡ha venido!». {n}El hombre tuerto duda y hace una torpe reverencia.{/n} «¡Tenemos una solicitud! ¡Una petición! Por favor, autorice el {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}aumento{/g} de trabajadores por debajo del rango de oficial novato en el Sector Bionica para responder a la necesidad de mejorar la eficiencia de su mano de obra». {n}Vomita las palabras claramente memorizadas en un veloz aluvión, y después añade de mala manera:{/n} «¡Estas sabandijas no quieren darnos brazos y piernas de hierro, pero nosotros solo queremos trabajar por usted y por el {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}!».

languages.text: “舰长大人，您……您来了！{n}”独眼男子迟疑了一下，笨拙地鞠了一躬。{/n}“我们有一个请求！一份请愿！为提高劳动效率，特此请求授权为仿生区下级军官职级以下的工人进行{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}改造！”{n}他脱口而出那些显然是死记硬背下来的词句，随即愤愤不平地补充道，{/n}“那帮混蛋不想赋予我们铁手铁脚！可我们也只是想干活啊，为了您，也为了{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}！”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, you... you came!" {n}The one-eyed man hesitates and bows awkwardly.{/n} "We have a request! A petition! To authorise the {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} of workers below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，您……您来了！{n}”独眼男子迟疑了一下，笨拙地鞠了一躬。{/n}“我们有一个请求！一份请愿！为提高劳动效率，特此请求授权为仿生区下级军官职级以下的工人进行{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}改造！”{n}他脱口而出那些显然是死记硬背下来的词句，随即愤愤不平地补充道，{/n}“那帮混蛋不想赋予我们铁手铁脚！可我们也只是想干活啊，为了您，也为了{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}！”

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, vous... vous êtes là ! » {n}s'exclame le borgne d'une voix hésitante avant de vous adresser une révérence maladroite.{/n} « Nous avons une demande à vous présenter ! Une pétition ! Nous souhaitons que vous autorisiez l'{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} des travailleurs de rang inférieur à celui de sous-officier dans le secteur Bionica, afin d'accroître l'efficacité de la main-d'œuvre, » {n}annonce-t-il à une cadence rapide, récitant manifestement une déclaration apprise par cœur, puis il ajoute sur un ton irrité :{/n} « Ces vermines refusent de nous donner des bras et des jambes de fer ! Mais nous voulons simplement travailler, pour servir l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} et vos intérêts ! »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, you... you came!" {n}The one-eyed man hesitates and bows awkwardly.{/n} "We have a request! A petition! To authorise the {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} of workers below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}!"

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, vous... vous êtes là ! » {n}s'exclame le borgne d'une voix hésitante avant de vous adresser une révérence maladroite.{/n} « Nous avons une demande à vous présenter ! Une pétition ! Nous souhaitons que vous autorisiez l'{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} des travailleurs de rang inférieur à celui de sous-officier dans le secteur Bionica, afin d'accroître l'efficacité de la main-d'œuvre, » {n}annonce-t-il à une cadence rapide, récitant manifestement une déclaration apprise par cœur, puis il ajoute sur un ton irrité :{/n} « Ces vermines refusent de nous donner des bras et des jambes de fer ! Mais nous voulons simplement travailler, pour servir l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g} et vos intérêts ! »

languages.text: "Lord Captain, Ihr ... Ihr seid gekommen!" {n}Der einäugige Mann zögert und verbeugt sich ungeschickt.{/n} "Wir haben eine Bitte! Eine Petition! Für Arbeiter unterhalb des Ranges niederer Offizier im Sektor Bionika sollten {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} erlaubt werden, weil die Effizienz der Arbeiter gesteigert werden muss." {n}Er haspelt die offenbar auswendig gelernten Worte hastig hervor und fügt dann gereizt hinzu:{/n} "Das Ungeziefer will uns keine Arme und Beine aus Eisen geben! Dabei wollen wir nur für das Wohl von Euch und dem {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} arbeiten!"
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, you... you came!" {n}The one-eyed man hesitates and bows awkwardly.{/n} "We have a request! A petition! To authorise the {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmentation{/g} of workers below the rank of junior officer in the Sector Bionica due to the need to increase the efficiency of the workforce." {n}He blurts out the obviously memorised words in a rapid stream, then adds peevishly:{/n} "The vermin don't want to give us iron arms and legs! But we just want to work, for the good of you and the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}!"

Dabei wollen wir nur für das Wohl von Euch und dem {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g} arbeiten!"
